name: 08_raw_exactly_neg_half_representable
description: Raw value exactly -0.5 via a different input combination (symphony_vol == 1.0, multiplier == 0.5). -0.5 is exactly representable in IEEE-754 double precision (binary fraction 2^-1), so this boundary is bit-exact.
derivation: raw = -(1.0 * 0.5) = -0.5. min(-0.5, -0.5) = -0.5. max(-3.0, -0.5) = -0.5. -0.5 is bit-exact (2^-1) in IEEE-754, so this is a deterministic boundary.
